sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n3573" key="a)kro/leion" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἀκρό-λειον</orth>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">τό</gen><foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">, (λείἀ</foreign> <sense id="n3573.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <xr opt="n" TEIform="xr"> <lbl opt="n" TEIform="lbl">=</lbl> <ref targOrder="U" lang="greek" TEIform="ref">ἀκροθίνιον</ref></xr>, <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Suid.</author> </bibl> </sense> </entryFree>
